character.title: Character
character.description: A custom or preset storyboard character archetype.

appearance.description: Specific visual details for image generation.

avatarUrl.description: URL or vector path for the character design.

accentColor.description: Theme color code (hex) linked with character tags.

isPreset.description: Whether the character is a pre-packaged default.

comic.title: Comic
comic.description: A multi-panel completed comic script and layout sequence.

id.description: Unique identifier of the comic book storyboard.

title.description: Fictional title of the comic project.

description.description: Synopsis or creative prompt story plot.

characters.description: List of character IDs utilized in pages.

panels.description: A detailed sequence of visual panels, panels dialogs, placements, and captions.

createdAt.description: Date of initial story generation as localized string.

characters.description: Saves and retrieves a user's roster of characters.

comics.description: Saves and retrieves a user's collection of storyboard comics.
